tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within or close to normal limits, except for mildly elevated chloride and LDL cholesterol. Renal function, glucose control, and other electrolytes are normal. The slightly high LDL may warrant dietary or therapeutic consideration depending on cardiovascular risk. No evidence of acute metabolic or renal disturbance.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
